title: Code of Civil Procedure, 1908
objective: Civil litigation deck for jurisdiction, interim remedies, and execution strategy.

sections.topic: Courts to try all civil suits unless barred
sections.note: Initial maintainability checkpoint before drafting plaint or challenging forum.
Relevant where similar issues are already pending in a previously instituted suit.
Foundation step for valid filing mechanics and pleading readiness.
Mandatory pre-suit compliance item in actions against state authorities.
Supports interim relief planning including attachment and protective orders.
Fallback route where procedural gaps exist and justice-oriented directions are needed.
